programme.title: Global Questions
programme.desc: Almost 60 per cent of Africa's population is under the age of 25, with an average age of 19, making Africa the world's youngest continent. Yet, it is still run by elderly politicians who are often leaders for life. More than 30 per cent of Africa's growing youth population is not employed, not in education, nor receiving any form of training. It is the young who lie at the heart of Africa's untapped potential, yet many believe African governments are failing to create jobs for them or provide them with the skills they need to prepare for the future. Is this a generational failure that threatens the stability of the continent?

programme.title: Port Pàipeir
programme.desc: The summer has come to an end and Matilda must go back to the capital, moving away from her friends, especially Charlie

programme.title: Fuine (Home Baking)
programme.desc: While out-and-about, Mairi MacRitchie tastes traditional Cornish pasties with crisp pastry and a tender meat and vegetable filling. She later prepares a Battenberg cake

programme.title: Speaking Our Language
programme.desc: An opportunity to learn Gaelic. Presented by Rhoda MacDonald

programme.title: Earrann Eachdraidh (History Shorts)
programme.desc: Documentary looking at high and low sports, including deep sea diving and mountain climbing

programme.title: An Là (News)
programme.desc: Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA

programme.title: Leugh Mi (Book Show)
programme.desc: Anna Macleod is in conversation with two guests each week about their favourite books. This week, she is joined by Rev Donald Michael MacInnes and Joe Sanders

programme.title: Of Diabolical Purpose - Sgeulachd Monsieur Chantrelle
programme.desc: Using dramatic reconstructions and expert opinion, John Morrison revisits the story of Eugene Chantrelle, a French teacher hanged for murdering his wife in Edinburgh in 1878. A gifted linguist with medical knowledge, he frequently threatened to poison his wife - and was accused of so doing upon her death. Chantrelle pleaded his innocence up to the moment he was hanged and the evidence against him was circumstancial - and his great-grandson speaks of the lasting damage caused to the family

programme.title: Seòid a' Chidsin - The Kitchen Coves
programme.desc: Ruaridh makes a tasty beer-battered fish, while Uisdean prepares twice-cooked chips to go with it, and then makes Scampi and “Clampi” in tempura batter

programme.title: Bana-Churaidhean/Warrior Women
programme.desc: Docu-drama series on history's most iconic women fighters. This episode follows the life of a fictional Roman gladiatrix called Ardala

programme.title: Dhan Uisge
programme.desc: Calum Maclean heads to Loch Morlich, a freshwater loch near Aviemore for a frosty swim

programme.title: Mach à Seo!
programme.desc: Ramsay MacMahon travels to East Lothian for a weekend of high-octane fun and fascinating history. Starting in Dunbar, Ramsay learns about the humble beginnings of John Muir

programme.title: Alba Today
programme.desc: BBC Alba joins Radio nan Gàidheal, the BBC's Gaelic language radio service

programme.title: Good Morning Britain
programme.desc: Morning magazine featuring a lively mix of news and current affairs, plus health, entertainment and lifestyle features

programme.title: Lorraine
programme.desc: Entertainment, current affairs and fashion news, as well as showbiz stories and celebrity gossip. Presented by Lorraine Kelly

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: A mix of celebrity chat, lifestyle features, advice and competitions

programme.title: Loose Women
programme.desc: More celebrity interviews and topical debate from a female perspective

programme.title: Judge Rinder
programme.desc: Cameras follow criminal barrister Robert Rinder as he takes on real-life cases in a studio courtroom

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: A team of friends compete in the game show, taking it in turns to find the answers to top 10 lists, before trying to score a perfect 10 in the final round. Hosted by Sally Lindsay

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Harry, Bill, Samantha and Donna pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Party Election Broadcast
programme.desc: By the Conservative candidate for the London mayoral election.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Ethan and Manpreet share a moment. Lydia gets shocking news. Chas and Marlon struggle

programme.title: For the Love of Britain
programme.desc: As the series draws to a close, Julie Walters presents a guide to some of the most beautiful sights the Peak District has to offer. Actor Katherine Kelly heads out on an inspiring hill walk up Mam Tor, while Ben Fogle gets a taste of the special honey produced by peak district bees. Stanage Edge wows Ore Oduba with a stunning view, and Liz Bonnin is at the magnificent Lyme Park Estate to witness an annual wildlife ritual

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson hosts the big-prize quiz in which another line-up of contestants answer questions that could change their lives - with the lifelines Phone a Friend, 50-50 and Ask the Host available to them if they get stuck

programme.title: Gordon, Gino and Fred: Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay, Gino D'Acampo and Fred Sirieix's European adventure brings them to Fred's cherished homeland of France, where an old friend has asked him to host an oyster festival in Arcachon on the Atlantic coast. As the trio set off across France in search of ingredients, Fred is determined to show his companions the best his country has to offer, with highlights including the famous nudist beaches of the French Riviera - where Gordon attracts unwanted attention - an unruly pony and Fred demonstrating his questionable musical skills

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: The Station: Trouble on the Tracks
programme.desc: The rail mobile detection team discovers a high-tech home - complete with electricity, running water and TV - illegally erected under an arch beside one of the country's busiest areas of track. At Euston, Transport Police officers are called upon when tempers flare - and deal with an unusual Royal request. Meanwhile, a strike hits Birmingham's New Street Station and the rail network on one of the busiest days of the year. With industrial action on West Midlands Trains, many passengers are left high and dry, and it's down to Network Rail to deliver the bad news

programme.title: The Metro: A Rail Life Story
programme.desc: A train breaks down in a tunnel near the Metro's busiest station, drawing attention to the fact that many of the vehicles in the Metro fleet are past their best. Track inspection supervisor Wayne has his work cut out repairing decaying sleepers which, if not quickly replaced, could cause a train derailment, and customer service manager Alan has his quiet night in rudely interrupted when he is called into work to deal with an outbreak of anti-social behaviour

programme.title: FYI Extra
programme.desc: Short bulletin rounding up the day's showbusiness stories

programme.title: Winning Combination
programme.desc: Omid Djalili host the quiz, with Gail, Gary, Jonah, Roshan, Lisa, Rachael, Taven, Nick and Grant trying to be among the four that make the final round for chance to to win the four-digit jackpot defined by the number they were each assigned at the start

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Manpreet encourages Ethan to speak to his dad. Mack is left rattled. Cathy uses April to get close to Ellis

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tyrone tells Alina about Maria's threat, and Ms Pop is pleased. Rita is stunned when foster daughter Sharon Bentley turns up at the Kabin for the first time in more than 20 years, having nominated the Weatherfield regular for a special award

programme.title: Paul O'Grady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: The comedian follows the work of Battersea Dogs & Cats Home in London, meeting staff involved in treating, training and rehoming animals. This time, Paul helps staff train a lively beagle cross puppy, before spending the day keeping a bichon company that is used to living in a busy home. Later, he helps a shell-shocked elderly staffy who was left tied to the gates, and subsequently gets caught up in an outbreak of parvo virus which all the Battersea staff battle to contain

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Hope is upset as Fiz and Tyrone row, each blaming the other for the breakdown of their relationship. Jenny convinces Gemma that Sharon cannot be trusted. Seb is thrilled when Nina invites him to stay the night

programme.title: Gordon, Gino and Fred: Road Trip
programme.desc: The final destination on the trio's culinary adventure is Gordon Ramsay's birthplace of Scotland, where the chef is planning a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his esteemed friends. If the meal is successful Gordon will be officially welcomed into the clan, so he is desperate for everything to be perfect. The trio set out to tour the country in search of ingredients, including Scottish beef and scallops, but also find time to take part in the Highland Games and dress up like real Scotsmen - with Gino taking a particular shine to his sporran

programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.desc: Political magazine show presented by Robert Peston, featuring major interviews with MPs, topical guests and cultural figures. Including updates from social media taking in perspectives from viewers, experts and key players throughout the programme

programme.title: Tonight

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon frets, Mandy is in danger, and Tracy feels put out

programme.title: Britain's Brightest Celebrity Family
programme.desc: The Ruddock brothers come up against Olympian Colin Jackson and his clan. They'll face a variety of general knowledge-based rounds under the watchful eye of Anne Hegerty, as they attempt to make it through to the semi finals. Who will succeed and get closer to the chance of winning £25,000 for their chosen charity?

programme.title: Accused of Murdering Our Son - The Steven Clark Story
programme.desc: Steven Clark, 23, disappeared in mysterious circumstances following a family walk with his mother on the 28th December, 1992. In September 2020, his parents Doris, 81, and Charles, 78, were arrested on suspicion of murder following a review by police from the Cleveland and North Yorkshire Cold Case Unit. Presenter and ex-detective Mark Williams-Thomas takes a look at the case

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Anne: The Princess Royal at 70
programme.desc: A special documentary marking Princess Anne's 70th birthday, as she talks openly about her life and work, and the reality of growing up as a member of the Royal family. Throughout the programme, Princess Anne talks frankly about a family in which women tended to be seen as 'honorary men', about the challenges for younger royalty, about a bloody kidnap attempt, and about refusing titles for her children, Peter and Zara

programme.title: FYI Extra
programme.desc: Short bulletin rounding up the day's showbusiness stories

programme.title: Martin & Roman's Weekend Best!
programme.desc: Father-and son duo Martin and Roman Kemp return with their chat show, this time scheduled on both days of the weekend, with resident chef Shivi Ramoutar serving up deliciously simple dishes. They are joined on the first edition by guests Rick Edwards and Vick Hope

In September 2020, his parents Doris, 81, and Charles, 78, were arrested on suspicion of murder following a review by police from the Cleveland and North Yorkshire Cold Case Unit. Presenter and ex-detective Mark Williams-Thomas takes a look at the case

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Anne: The Princess Royal at 70
programme.desc: A special documentary marking Princess Anne's 70th birthday, as she talks openly about her life and work, and the reality of growing up as a member of the Royal family. Throughout the programme, Princess Anne talks frankly about a family in which women tended to be seen as 'honorary men', about the challenges for younger royalty, about a bloody kidnap attempt, and about refusing titles for her children, Peter and Zara

programme.title: FYI Extra
programme.desc: Short bulletin rounding up the day's showbusiness stories

programme.title: Martin & Roman's Weekend Best!
programme.desc: Father-and son duo Martin and Roman Kemp return with their chat show, this time scheduled on both days of the weekend, with resident chef Shivi Ramoutar serving up deliciously simple dishes. They are joined on the first edition by guests Rick Edwards and Vick Hope

programme.desc: In Manchester, Max, Denison and Callum go up against each other in a series of shopping challenges hoping to win the affections of Newcastle model Sophiah

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts the game show, asking Strictly head judge Shirley Ballas, actress Bhavna Limbachia and This Morning's resident GP Dr Ranj Singh to 'see it and say it' as they try to guess the familiar phrases hidden in animated clues. The players battle to reach the Super Catchphrase round, where one of them could win £50,000 for their chosen charities

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring a fire extinguisher that explodes in a builder's face, a dog that looks like Andrew Lloyd Webber and a man who runs himself over with a tractor

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: The Cloud 9 employees prepare a send-off for Amy and Jonah, while Dina searches for a new best friend and Mateo and Glenn plan a video tribute

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: A controversial film-maker puts a cow outside the restaurant in a bid to make a statement. Bob is livid, especially when it starts to scare away customers, but he later surprises everyone by treating it as a member of the family

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Tina develops a crush on a martial arts instructor and decides to join his class, but Bob is annoyed when her new hobby interferes with her job at the restaurant. He attempts to straighten things out by visiting the gym, only to suffer a very public humiliation. Animated sitcom, starring H Jon Benjamin

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Chris runs away to South America to avoid a painful high-school initiation ceremony, and is soon joined by Peter, who has grown weary of his job at the beer factory. The pair are treated like gods by tribesmen, but realise they cannot escape their problems for ever

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Brian gets a job with prestigious magazine The New Yorker, but it is not long before his new employer discovers he did not graduate from college, and promptly fires him. Filled with a burning desire to vindicate himself, he resolves to finish his education

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Lois thinks Stewie is trying to kill her because he is not spending enough time with his father. She tells Peter to make an effort to bond with the youngster - but a theme park outing ends in disaster

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter learns Loretta is having an affair and decides to tell Cleveland - whose response proves disappointingly low-key. Meanwhile, Joe almost dies during a game of charades, prompting Lois to make the family take first-aid classes. Featuring the guest voices of actress Jennifer Tilly and former wrestler Randy Savage

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Brian is selected to appear on a TV dating show, but ends up falling for the star and pursues her after the cameras have been switched off. Meanwhile, Chris develops a nasty case of acne that gets him into trouble by encouraging him to do bad deeds. Seth MacFarlane's animated sitcom, with the guest voice of Jessica Biel

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Crossover episode in which characters from Family Guy and The Cleveland Show end up meeting the Smiths when a storm hits the towns of Quahog, Stoolbend and Langley Falls

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Snot is rejected after professing his love for Hayley, so Roger decides to give him a new love interest - by pretending to be Steve's female cousin. Meanwhile, Stan tries to live like a gentleman of the 1960s, complete with dark suits and dry martinis

programme.title: Celebrity Juice
programme.desc: The return of the comedy quiz hosted by Keith Lemon, with Roman Kemp, Shirley Ballas, Judi Love and Jamie Laing joining captains Laura Whitmore and Emily Atack

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Jimmy Pesto threatens to take over Bob's lease so he can expand his gift shop - prompting the beleaguered burger bar owner to come up with a new recipe to attract more customers. However, when his arch-rival decides to start selling his own burgers at the pizzeria, the two restaurateurs are drawn into an increasingly bitter battle for business. Featuring the guest voices of Kevin Kline and sisters Laura and Sarah Silverman

programme.desc: A well-known eccentric contacts the Belgian sleuth when he is haunted by suicidal nightmares. However, he fails to follow Poirot's advice, and is found dead soon afterwards. Drama, starring David Suchet, with Joely Richardson and Mary Tamm

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Two grieving widows lay rival claims to a corpse found washed up on the beach, each insisting it is the body of her missing husband. programme.desc: Ken tells Alec he will never escort for him again. Toyah is delighted to catch vegan Log eating a bacon sandwich. Deirdre is forced to drop Liz as a character witness

programme.desc: When a man's charred remains are found after an explosion, Foyle's investigations lead him to a top secret intelligence organisation. With murder and deception rife among its members, the race is on to find out the truth, but the detective's discoveries threaten his future career. Wartime drama, starring Michael Kitchen with guests Angela Thorne, Ronald Pickup and Samuel West

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A dentist falls in love with his young assistant. His anxious wife, believing he has made plans to poison her and thereby remove the main obstacle to happiness, calls for Poirot's help. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The mysterious disappearance of a sheep farmer leads Wycliffe into the heart of a rural community whose apparently tranquil surface conceals a desperate struggle for survival. It is not long before he uncovers disturbing evidence suggesting foul play. Drama, starring Jack Shepherd, Helen Masters and Jimmy Yuill

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A mischievous trickster finally gets his comeuppance when his body is found floating below the weir in Midsomer Deverell. The extent of his double life starts to emerge when three family friends and a long-lost niece produce wills claiming his fortune, and his collection of erotic photographs from the 1960s gives Barnaby and Jones the key to the tangled relationships and feuds blighting the family

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When a teenager with severe learning difficulties is killed in a fire at his home, Brooks and Devlin's investigation leads them to the last person they thought could be responsible. Matters are further complicated when Steel and Phillips come up against brash defence lawyer Dominic Peck, whose win-at-all-costs attitude and outrageous ego threaten the fair outcome of the trial. Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Ben Daniels star

programme.title: Honour
programme.desc: Part two of two. Banaz's body is found in Birmingham following a lead from a phone tap, but the DNA evidence is destroyed when a water pipe bursts. More evidence from the phones lead to Banaz' father and uncle standing trial, where their solicitors mount a convincing defence - until Bekhal courageously steps forward to deliver evidence from behind a screen. Meanwhile, Caroline tries to arrange for the last two perpetrators to be extradited from Iraq to the UK

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Another chance to see the feature-length first episode of the popular detective drama. Inspector Jack Frost's investigation into the case of a missing child uncovers a skeleton chained to a locked strongbox that tantalisingly turns out to be empty, but provides evidence of a crime committed 30 years previously. David Jason stars as the irascible detective, with Bruce Alexander, Matt Bardock and Claire Hackett

programme.desc: The Belgian detective is summoned to a hotel by a mysterious veiled lady who tells him that her forthcoming marriage is under threat because she is being blackmailed over a love letter. Drama, starring David Suchet and Frances Barber

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: A mysterious fire that killed an artist with links to political activists leaves the police baffled, while Bright finds himself short-staffed when a stomach bug puts most of his men on sick leave. The situation becomes more serious when a housewife dies of the same condition. Endeavour investigates a family-run supermarket, believing the infection may have stemmed from their stock being deliberately contaminated, and discovers dark secrets that may have a connection to the unexplained blaze

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A six-month-old boy dies in what appears to be a case of cot death, but when shaken baby syndrome is later revealed as the cause, Brooks and Devlin are left with a murder investigation that throws up many possible suspects. New evidence then comes to light during the trial, casting doubt over the prosecution's case, with Steel and Phillips forced into doing some detective work of their own. Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Ben Daniels star

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A body is found with a note reading 'They Must Be Destroyed' - a chilling reminder of a case Brooks was involved in six years previously, when extreme racist Andrew Dillon killed three boys from ethnic minorities. Steel is then put under intense scrutiny when it is revealed that his success in convicting Dillon was largely due to selective prosecution. Bradley Walsh and Ben Daniels star

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Feature-length episode of the crime drama. programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Part one of two. While holidaying in Cornwall with his friend Captain Hastings, the sleuth meets a local woman who has seemingly become unaccountably accident-prone - but soon starts to suspect she is actually a victim of foul play. David Suchet and Hugh Fraser star

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Called to investigate the attempted theft of a headless skeleton from an archaeological dig, Wycliffe finds himself forced to deal with landowners whose archaic values are jarringly at odds with the modern world. Detective drama, starring Jack Shepherd

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective is faced with a difficult case when he investigates the discovery of a body in a well, and he also has to contend with a new boss, Chief Superintendent Moody, who is dubious as to Lewis' motivation for coming out of retirement. As investigations into the human remains in the well proceed, an avant-garde artist's body is also discovered and at first glance it looks like a tragic drugs overdose, but Hathaway and Lewis quickly recognise the tell tale signs of murder

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The team struggles to understand the involvement of 12-year-old Kaden Blake in the shooting of mother and carer Lia Brown. As a victim of gang culture, the boy's only protection is keeping silent, and by speaking out about the crime, he sets in motion a devastating chain of events. Guest starring Lucy Speed (EastEnders, The Bill), with Bradley Walsh and Jamie Bamber

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: DS Sam Casey, a young officer with a strong sense of justice, is brought in to investigate the shooting of Devlin outside the Old Bailey, and is surprised to learn the gunman was specifically targeting police officers. The case sees the whole team emotionally spent, with the trial itself at risk of being derailed by a politically driven defence lawyer (Colin Salmon) with an axe to grind. Crime drama, starring Bradley Walsh, Freema Agyeman and Paul Nicholls, who joins the cast

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The detective is paired with DC Webster, an officer who is struggling to fit in with life in Denton after being seconded from Scotland, with the duo investigating a robbery at a local casino and a hit-and-run incident involving Roger Massie, the son of a local politician, and soon finds that both matters are linked. David Jason stars, with Bruce Alexander and George Anton

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A well-known eccentric contacts the Belgian sleuth when he is haunted by suicidal nightmares. However, he fails to follow Poirot's advice, and is found dead soon afterwards. Drama, starring David Suchet, with Joely Richardson and Mary Tamm

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Two grieving widows lay rival claims to a corpse found washed up on the beach, each insisting it is the body of her missing husband. While it is obvious only one can be telling the truth, the detective finds it tricky to discern which of the women is lying - and why. Drama, guest starring Eleanor Bron, with Jack Shepherd

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Gina is assaulted, and is shocked by the reaction of the Aidensfield residents when suspicion falls on a local policeman - until the attacker strikes again. Nick Berry stars

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken tells Alec he will never escort for him again. Toyah is delighted to catch vegan Log eating a bacon sandwich. Deirdre is forced to drop Liz as a character witness

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: When a man's charred remains are found after an explosion, Foyle's investigations lead him to a top secret intelligence organisation. With murder and deception rife among its members, the race is on to find out the truth, but the detective's discoveries threaten his future career. Wartime drama, starring Michael Kitchen with guests Angela Thorne, Ronald Pickup and Samuel West

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A dentist falls in love with his young assistant. His anxious wife, believing he has made plans to poison her and thereby remove the main obstacle to happiness, calls for Poirot's help. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The mysterious disappearance of a sheep farmer leads Wycliffe into the heart of a rural community whose apparently tranquil surface conceals a desperate struggle for survival. It is not long before he uncovers disturbing evidence suggesting foul play. Drama, starring Jack Shepherd, Helen Masters and Jimmy Yuill

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A mischievous trickster finally gets his comeuppance when his body is found floating below the weir in Midsomer Deverell. The extent of his double life starts to emerge when three family friends and a long-lost niece produce wills claiming his fortune, and his collection of erotic photographs from the 1960s gives Barnaby and Jones the key to the tangled relationships and feuds blighting the family

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When a teenager with severe learning difficulties is killed in a fire at his home, Brooks and Devlin's investigation leads them to the last person they thought could be responsible. Matters are further complicated when Steel and Phillips come up against brash defence lawyer Dominic Peck, whose win-at-all-costs attitude and outrageous ego threaten the fair outcome of the trial. Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Ben Daniels star

programme.title: Honour
programme.desc: Part two of two. Banaz's body is found in Birmingham following a lead from a phone tap, but the DNA evidence is destroyed when a water pipe bursts. More evidence from the phones lead to Banaz' father and uncle standing trial, where their solicitors mount a convincing defence - until Bekhal courageously steps forward to deliver evidence from behind a screen. Meanwhile, Caroline tries to arrange for the last two perpetrators to be extradited from Iraq to the UK

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Another chance to see the feature-length first episode of the popular detective drama. Inspector Jack Frost's investigation into the case of a missing child uncovers a skeleton chained to a locked strongbox that tantalisingly turns out to be empty, but provides evidence of a crime committed 30 years previously. David Jason stars as the irascible detective, with Bruce Alexander, Matt Bardock and Claire Hackett

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Foyle responds to complaints of sabotage at an RAF burns hospital and uncovers adultery and murder within the medical unit. Wartime crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen, John Wood, Honeysuckle Weeks and Julian Ovenden

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective is summoned to a hotel by a mysterious veiled lady who tells him that her forthcoming marriage is under threat because she is being blackmailed over a love letter. Drama, starring David Suchet and Frances Barber

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A schoolgirl is found dead after a disco, and Cornish copper Charles Wycliffe applies himself to the task of discovering whether she was murdered or committed suicide. Jack Shepherd and Helen Masters star

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: A mysterious fire that killed an artist with links to political activists leaves the police baffled, while Bright finds himself short-staffed when a stomach bug puts most of his men on sick leave. The situation becomes more serious when a housewife dies of the same condition. Endeavour investigates a family-run supermarket, believing the infection may have stemmed from their stock being deliberately contaminated, and discovers dark secrets that may have a connection to the unexplained blaze

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A six-month-old boy dies in what appears to be a case of cot death, but when shaken baby syndrome is later revealed as the cause, Brooks and Devlin are left with a murder investigation that throws up many possible suspects. New evidence then comes to light during the trial, casting doubt over the prosecution's case, with Steel and Phillips forced into doing some detective work of their own. Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Ben Daniels star

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A body is found with a note reading 'They Must Be Destroyed' - a chilling reminder of a case Brooks was involved in six years previously, when extreme racist Andrew Dillon killed three boys from ethnic minorities. Steel is then put under intense scrutiny when it is revealed that his success in convicting Dillon was largely due to selective prosecution. Bradley Walsh and Ben Daniels star

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Feature-length episode of the crime drama. David Jason stars as the grouchy inspector, with Tony Haygarth, Diane Bull, Denise Black and Dominic Jephcott

programme.desc: Bodie is captured and held hostage in a vicarage by four German terrorists - and as time runs out, he finds himself forced to make a deal with them before anyone gets hurt. Gabrielle Drake guest stars, with Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry takes a job driving a Mercedes, but it gets stolen while his back is turned, and to make matters worse he is accused of stealing a cache of diamonds concealed in the car. Vintage comedy, starring Dennis Waterman and George Cole

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: A girl asks Robin to help safeguard an ancient treasure cared for by her father, who has foreseen his own death and wishes to appoint a successor while there is still time. Cathryn Harrison and Cyril Cusack guest star

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar agrees to act as go-between, taking ransom money to the kidnappers of the wayward daughter of a rich film producer. However, he has a trick up his sleeve - quite literally - in the shape of a camera disguised as a wrist-watch, so even though he is blindfolded, he can later retrace his steps. Roger Moore directs and stars

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Jim poses as a photographer to investigate a terrorist group's activities. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are asked to investigate an incident dating back to 1953 after a death-bed confession reveals the key witness in a major corruption trial did not commit suicide as was believed, but was murdered by the police officers assigned to protect her. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry gives shelter to a friend who has broken out of prison, but his act of charity backfires, costing poor old Arthur dearly. Derek Thompson (Casualty) and Sherrie Hewson (Loose Women) feature alongside George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi, Tom Dove and Neil Spooner head to Bosnia, seeing how the country has recovered from war and fishing for huge carp in a well-stocked lake. First stop though is a bit of predator fishing in neighbouring Serbia, before a long drive gives them a chance to see parts of both countries, and how they have recovered after the conflict in the 1990s

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as singer Paul Young, Olympic gold medallist Jade Jones, Strictly professional Aljaz Skorjanec and comedian Arthur Smith pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Virgin's clubhouse manager Holly showers passengers with her VIP treatment Valentine-style, while officers Terry and Dave have to deal with an unhappy upgraded passenger. Meanwhile, a full A330 could be in trouble as a new recruit has his first attempt at pushing it to the runway. Narrated by Joanna Lumley

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Border officers Kat and Tracy help a student from India, who's arrived with no fixed abode. Out on the airfield during the morning rush hour, Airside Ian is ducking and diving on the runway - and Terminal 4 welcomes an exuberant new ambassador. Narrated by Joanna Lumley

programme.title: Crimson Tide (1995)
programme.desc: A veteran US submarine captain receives an incomplete message after a Russian base falls into rebel hands, and is convinced it is an order to fire his nuclear weapons. However, his first officer refuses to take such potentially devastating action without confirmed orders, leading to a deadly battle of wills. Thriller, starring Gene Hackman, Denzel Washington and Viggo Mortensen

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Brooklyn, New York, to tackle a 55-year-old family business. Owner John Esposito left school at the age of 14 and has worked at his parents' restaurant, Sal's Pizzeria, ever since. Their success meant they could afford to purchase the location next door in the 1990s, naming it Mama Maria after John's mother, who died in 2002. But when he lost his father as well, John became overwhelmed by the responsibility of running both establishments and his livelihood is at risk

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sherry and her partner Phil kick-off the contest in Oxfordshire, with a traditional menu with a modern twist served in their grand dining room. On day two, competitive couple Jade and Luke rely on their menu of happy hearty food as their winning ticket. On the final night, Zahra and Conall plan to impress their guests with plates of perfectly presented food. Old smoothie Phil gives romance-shirking Conall a few lessons in love, before a few embarrassing pet names and the £1,000 prize winners are revealed

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty is in Thailand asking how the blossom from a banana tree is shaking up fish and chip suppers. Matt Tebbutt visits Spain to find out how the delicate raspberry gets from fields to fridges without turning to mush, and Andi Oliver heads to an onion factory to see how the eye-watering vegetables are peeled on a gigantic scale

programme.title: The £100k Drop
programme.desc: Davina McCall hosts as couples from Cheshire and Wolverhampton take part in the quiz in which contestants can win up to £100,000

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The coach reaches glamorous Portofino, but one tourist is winding everyone up, including their partner, leading to another feisty vote

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Together with children from Redhills Community Primary School, Devon, Kirstie Allsopp makes a scarecrow for her local county show at Chagford. She also learns a thing or two from 14-year-old Sarah Whitely about how to show a saddleback pig, and she judges some of the cutest and shortest sheep handlers, aged 6 to 12

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley present the words-and-numbers game, with Nicki Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The bar-room staff and regulars are bequeathed $100,000 by a former customer, but their new-found wealth soon causes friction. Classic comedy, starring Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla asks Sam to be her 'plus one' for her ex-husband Nick's wedding to his glamorous new flame, but Sam's appearance makes Nick so jealous that he begs Carla to take him back. Comedy, with Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra try to conceal an embarrassing accident by telling Frank they fell down the stairs, sending him into a DIY frenzy that puts him in hospital

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Marie hatch an elaborate plan to get Amy back with Robert - but only succeed in driving her into the arms of an all-too-eager Gianni

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones watch Geoffrey having trouble getting the hang of a game, but Ray learns the hard way that his son's lack of ability should not interfere with his enjoyment

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz persuades Frasier to go on a date with her friend - but the arrangement turns out to be a disaster. Niles and Daphne suspect their maid is dishonest

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin angrily accuses Frasier of eavesdropping on Ronee's private conversations, while prospective parents Niles and Daphne try to secure the services of Seattle's finest nursery artist. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. Niles is shocked when his former wife Maris asks for his help, deciding it is best to keep it a secret from the heavily pregnant and overemotional Daphne. Frasier goes back to private practice, but finds that treating patients face to face is a real test. Guest starring Dan Castellaneta (The Simpsons) and Sarah Silverman

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: When Erin and JB can't fix the doors back onto their solarium, Dick Strawbridge steps in to help them find a solution to their rusted hinges. Another leak is found, but this time from the roof, so they call in some professional climbers to scale their bell tower to find the source of the problem. With wedding season over, Tim and Margreeth launch a foodie weekend. With a professional chef hired to produce the food and some trainee butlers on hand to serve more than 20 guests, the couple can take it easy - apart from foraging for mushrooms, dressing the dining room and fixing a guest's belt. Meanwhile, May and her son Jack get the yoga room ready for the imminent arrival of guests.

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Includes headlines and weather

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Manchester, three rival couples compete to host the best dinner party and win £1,000. Michelle and Laura kick off the competition with a hearty yet elegant menu. On day two Rob and Emma up the ante with locally sourced produce that's 'proper' dinner party food, before Lorenzo and Katie put on generous Italian feast for the final night

programme.title: Steph's Packed Lunch
programme.desc: Steph McGovern presents the weekday magazine, including celebrity guests, food ideas, real-life features and entertainment, lifestyle and consumer stories. Plus, a sideways look at the news in One O'Clock Views

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley present the words-and-numbers game, with naturalist Chris Packham in Dictionary Corner, alongside wordsmith Susie Dent

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonathan and Stephen have busy lives running their own businesses, and can't wait to buy a holiday home near the glitzy town of Marbella on Spain's Costa del Sol. The couple are looking for an apartment near the beach, where they can chill out with friends while enjoying spectacular sea views on Spain's sunshine coast. With a budget of £250,000 Jean Johansson rises to the challenge, presenting the pair with five property options to consider

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Disaster strikes for smallholders in France, forcing them to diversify in an unusual direction. A couple from Oldham take on a bar renovation in Spain, while two Brits expand their glamping empire in France

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The fourth and final visit is to the Ladbrooke Hotel in the heart of Birmingham, where manager Snehal Lakhani claims he accepts nothing less than perfection. A room with a broken window proves far from flawless for Natasha and Laura, while Danni and Graham are concerned about the proximity of a train line to their bedroom

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a bounty hunter to earn extra money and hires an unlikely assistant in the form of Ned Flanders - who ends up pursuing him on a charge of skipping bail over a trivial offence. Meanwhile, Marge takes a job at an unusual bakery

programme.title: Ackley Bridge
programme.desc: Tahir's tall stories catch up with him when his plan to help Sam backfires disastrously. Kayla decides to keep a secret from Fizza, who has received bad news about her mother. Martin discovers that Johnny has a talent and makes him an offer

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Ste and James decide to make their relationship official, Tony wants to play match maker for Darren and Nancy, and John Paul is still reeling after the shocking news he received

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Lonesome teenager Jasmine seeks a canine companion to replace her twin sister Shola, who's leaving her to start a university course. Her family thinks that pedigree beagle Zoe will make the perfect new sibling, but Jasmine isn't so sure. Elsewhere, staff of Wood Green animal charity believe Jim the poodle could prove the perfect match for 12-year-old Lexi, who is looking for a 'bedtime buddy'

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Charlotte Ritchie, Jamali Maddix, Lee Mack, Mike Wozniak and Sarah Kendall continue their quest to curry favour with omnipotent Taskmaster Greg Davies. Jamali decorates the caravan, Sarah is appalled by a kiwi fruit and, under severe pressure, Mike delivers a revelation so visceral that it leaves everyone in a state of horrified delirium. As usual, Alex Horne offers the intrepid contenders moral support

programme.title: Frank of Ireland
programme.desc: Frank's mother Mary is bed-bound for the day, so it falls to him - and therefore Doofus - to complete her list of chores and nurse her back to health. The pair set about their tasks with enthusiasm, stupidly giving Mary sleeping pills so that they can finish their tasks in peace. However, when they return home after a stressful trip to the laundrette, they discover that Mary has escaped. Comedy, with Brian Gleeson, Domhnall Gleeson, Pom Boyd, Sarah Greene and Tom Vaughan-Lawlor

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show with a difference, in which another two singletons take their pick of potential partners based purely on their naked bodies. First up is 27-year-old Kelly, a carer from Brighton. She's unsure whether she's looking for a man or a woman but hopes to find her the perfect partner to give her a little TLC. She is followed by 29-year-old steeplejack Carlo from Somerset, who is looking for woman that he can sweep off her feet

programme.title: Snackmasters
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix sets two chefs to the near-impossible challenge of replicating a breakfast favourite - a bowl of Shreddies. Daniel Clifford and Claude Bosi both hold two Michelin stars. Both have also previously tried and failed to win a Snackmasters trophy, so this extremely difficult challenge is their chance to earn redemption. They have three weeks to work out the factory processes that give Shreddies their famous lattice pattern and layered structure, before a cook-off where the factory judges will decide the winner

programme.title: Trip Hazard: My Great British Adventure
programme.desc: Rosie Jones is joined by fellow comedian Joe Wilkinson for a traditional seaside adventure in the North Yorkshire coastal town of Whitby, a place that boasts history, gothic architecture and the chippie that won the award for the UK's best fish and chips. The pair explore the area's famed Jurassic Coast where, alongside a fossil-hunting expert, they attempt to find ancient relics on the beach. In homage to the area's association with Dracula, the duo also enjoy a full gothic makeover. Narrated by Olivia Colman

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Wilkinsburg in Pennsylvania, home to Ms Jean's Southern Cuisine, which was opened by retired special-education teacher Jean Gould. During the chef's attempt to save the business from disaster, he discovers her soul-food restaurant resembles a dentist's waiting room and finds a lot of tension between Jean and her employees, who claim she is a Jekyll-and-Hyde character

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples host dinner parties in the Spanish resort of Marbella as they competes for the cash prize of £1,000. Stephen and his Colombian boyfriend Juan plan to keep things simple in the kitchen, but two of their guests point out that the chicken is overcooked. At Glenn and Henriette's Mexican evening, the contestants get competitive when they're let loose on a pinata, and Tristan and Louise hope to inject love into their dinner party - until Stephen gives them frank feedback on the food

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Spaniel Scrumpy is suffering from lameness and Noel discovers he has a collapsed disc and severe elbow arthritis. He already has a chequered medical history totalling six previous operations to his elbows, hip and knee. Meanwhile, there is an emergency admission when a 15-month-old dachshund arrives with a mystery brain condition, and Noel and his neurology colleagues have their work cut out to identify the cause. When his condition rapidly deteriorates overnight, suddenly the life of this much-loved young dog hangs in the balance

programme.desc: A patient arrives at the surgery with a lengthy list of ailments she would like to discuss, and Dr Ashraf is up against the clock to tick off as many as she possibly can. Having recently been referred for suspected skin cancer on his arm, elderly patient Keith comes in to see Dr Arif about some worrying new symptoms, and Denise and Michael Peters see Dr Wyne to talk through Denise's epilepsy medication

programme.desc: Julian treats a seriously ill llama called Echo who is struggling to breathe, and he has the tricky job of conducting his very first llama chest X-ray. programme.desc: Clive decides to introduce a sheepdog puppy to the flock for the first time, and Miles and Sidney take on more responsibilities on the farm while Reuben is busy working full time at his apprenticeship. programme.title: Doctors of War: Saving Lives
programme.desc: Feature length documentary following UK surgeon John Buckels and a team of international and local medics as they battle to save the lives of people caught up a major humanitarian disaster in war-ravaged South Sudan. This raw and visceral film offers a snapshot of life inside one of the world's largest refugee camps, and the often brutal and unforgiving conditions of a country torn apart by ten years of conflict

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: Critical care paramedic Rob and doctor Adam fight to save the life of a boy who has been stabbed in the street. The 16-year-old has been knifed in the neck, has lost a significant amount of blood and is struggling to breathe. Elsewhere, Tom Waters is dispatched to 30-year-old bricklayer Daniel, who has sliced his arm with a power saw. He was cutting timber on a workbench using an angle grinder with a circular blade when he lost control and it sliced through his right hand

programme.title: The Murder of Sally Anne Bowman: 15 Years On
programme.desc: Looking back at the high-profile case of Sally Anne Bowman's murder in 2005, the 18-year-old woman who was attacked on the doorstep of her home in London. The programme reexamines the eventual arrest of Mark Dixie, who was finally found guilty of the crime and given life imprisonment three years after her death in 2008

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show

programme.title: Friends

programme.desc: Rachel struggles to find a way of breaking bad news about Phoebe's impending gig at Central Perk and Monica inadvertently poisons Ross with her kiwi-lime pie, leaving Chandler and Joey holding the baby. Comedy, starring Courteney Cox and David Schwimmer, with a guest appearance by singer Chrissie Hynde

programme.title: Portillo's Hidden History of Britain
programme.desc: In 1943, the village of Imber in Wiltshire's Salisbury Plain began to be used as a Second World War training ground. At risk from friendly fire, each household was ordered by the War Office to abandon its home for the duration of the conflict. Despite promises that the residents could return after the war, the village remains in the hands of the military, and has been since used for training against the IRA and the Taliban. Michael meets former residents and relatives to hear this story of upheaval, and talks to historians to reveal the history behind the desolation of this ancient village

programme.title: Great Artists

programme.title: Building Britain's Canals
programme.desc: Writer and historian Dan Jones navigates Britain's longest canal to be built by just one company, the Leeds and Liverpool Canal. Built to link the economically booming counties of Yorkshire and Lancashire, this 19th-century superhighway was experimental for the time, and made Liverpool the busiest port in the world. In Burnley, the cotton capital of the 19th century, Dan visits the world's only steam-powered cotton mill, where enough cloth was woven each year to reach to the moon and back two-and-a-half times

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers Gav Hall and Dan Mottishaw are in hot pursuit of a suspected drug dealer, but the two-wheeled tearaway runs out of road, flips his bike over and crashes into a hedge. programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Tim Marlow examines the work of Italian Renaissance painter Raffaello Santi, known better simply as Raphael, who was born in 1483 and achieved so much in his 37-year life that he was considered equal to Leonardo da Vinci and Michelangelo. He was highly regarded for his many studies of the Madonna and Child, and artists adopted his idealised forms as the model of beauty until the end of the 19th century

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Tim Marlow reveals how the Renaissance movement found a new centre in Venice and examines the life and work of Tiziano Vecellio, known to English-speakers as Titian, who pioneered the use of oils with a radical approach to light, colour and brush strokes. His talent was recognised across Europe and he painted portraits of some of the 16th century's most powerful figures, including Pope Paul III and Charles V of Spain

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: House Doctor

programme.title: The Naked Truth (1957)
programme.desc: Celebrities threatened with blackmail decide they would rather murder the extortionist than pay him, but things do not go according to plan. Comedy, starring Terry-Thomas, Peter Sellers, Dennis Price, Peggy Mount, Shirley Eaton and Joan Sims

programme.title: Tiger Bay (1959)
programme.desc: A Polish sailor flees Cardiff's docklands after murdering his girlfriend in a jealous rage, initially unaware that a 12-year-old tomboy has witnessed the crime and has taken his abandoned gun to show off to her friends. However, he comes back to abduct the girl in a bid to keep her quiet - but the pair form a friendship and she tries to help him escape the police. Thriller, starring Hayley Mills in her film debut alongside her father John, with Horst Buchholz

programme.title: Sword of Sherwood Forest (1960)
programme.desc: Legendary outlaw hero Robin Hood rallies his merry men to thwart a dastardly plan by the Sheriff of Nottingham to murder the Archbishop of Canterbury, who has denounced the sheriff's plot to confiscate another nobleman's land. Medieval adventure, starring Richard Greene, Peter Cushing, Niall MacGinnis, Richard Pasco, Sarah Branch and Oliver Reed

programme.title: The Wrecking Crew (1968)
programme.desc: A secret agent sets out to recover gold bullion stolen from a hijacked train being taken across America by cunning thieves. Fourth and final film in the Matt Helm comedy spy series, with Dean Martin, Sharon Tate, Elke Sommer, Nancy Kwan and Tina Louise

programme.title: Goodbye Christopher Robin (2017)
programme.desc: Biopic of children's author AA Milne, focusing on how his relationship with his son influenced the creation of the Winnie the Pooh stories. The books prove immensely popular in a nation recovering from the trauma of the First World War, but bring the youngster who inspired them uncomfortably into the public eye. Starring Domhnall Gleeson, Margot Robbie and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: The Abyss (1989)
programme.desc: An American nuclear submarine is sunk after a collision with a mysterious object, and the US government asks oil workers to help with the rescue. However, when they and a Navy Seal team arrive at the location of the vessel, a series of strange incidents leads to an encounter with aliens living in the depths. James Cameron's sci-fi thriller, starring Ed Harris, Michael Biehn and Mary Elizabeth Mastrantonio

programme.title: Prospect (2018)
programme.desc: A teenager and her father travel to a remote alien moon aiming to strike it rich, but there are others roving the wilderness and the job quickly devolves into a fight to survive. Sci-fi thriller, starring Sophie Thatcher, Jay Duplass and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Leaning into the Wind (2017)
programme.desc: Thomas Riedelsheimer's documentary following artist Andy Goldsworthy as he creates works that mediate, disrupt or commune with the environment

programme.title: Appointment with Danger (1950)
programme.desc: A nun is targeted by two murderers when they realise she is the only witness to one of their killings, and it is up to postal inspector to protect her and bring the men to justice. Noir thriller, starring Phyllis Calvert, Alan Ladd and Paul Stewart

programme.title: Hondo (1953)
programme.desc: A hard-boiled cavalry scout with a feral dog as companion stumbles across a woman and her child stranded on their homestead deep inside hostile territory. Despite repeated attacks by the Apaches, they refuse to leave their home, leaving the scout with no choice but to stay and defend her. Western, starring John Wayne, Geraldine Page, Ward Bond and Michael Pate

programme.title: Destroyer (1943)
programme.desc: A former welder working on the Navy destroyer whose construction he oversaw angers his crewmates with his relentless quest for perfection. Wartime adventure, starring Edward G Robinson, Glenn Ford, Marguerite Chapman and Regis Toomey

programme.title: The Black Arrow (1948)
programme.desc: A knight returning home from fighting in the Wars of the Roses returns home to discover his father has been murdered. A family friend fighting for the other side has been blamed for the crime, but the knight tries to prove his wicked uncle is responsible. Swashbuckling adventure based on Robert Louis Stevenson's novel, starring Louis Hayward and Janet Blair

programme.title: Ghostbusters (2016)
programme.desc: When a series of supernatural disturbances occurs in New York City, two experts in the paranormal investigate, joined by a brilliant inventor who has created an array of ghost-hunting gadgets and a public transport worker whose knowledge of the city provides vital clues to the sinister cause of the ghostly activity. Reboot of the 1980s comedy franchise, starring Kristen Wiig, Melissa McCarthy, Kate McKinnon, Leslie Jones and Chris Hemsworth

programme.title: Independence Day (1996)
programme.desc: A fleet of huge flying saucers launches a devastating and unprovoked attack on Earth. As survivors try to flee the seemingly unstoppable alien invaders, the courageous US president, an ace pilot and a computer genius come up with a plan to take the fight to the enemy and save the human race. Roland Emmerich's sci-fi adventure, starring Will Smith, Bill Pullman, Jeff Goldblum, Mary McDonnell, Randy Quaid, Robert Loggia and Harry Connick Jr

programme.title: Snowpiercer (2013)
programme.desc: In a snow-ravaged world, a group of travellers fight for survival on a train that perpetually circumnavigates the globe. The vehicle's occupants are divided into a military ruling elite and their dishevelled captives. But now, 17 years after the train set out on its seemingly never-ending journey, the downtrodden, abused captives have had enough. Revolution is afoot. Bong Joon Ho's fantasy thriller, starring Chris Evans, Song Kang-ho, Tilda Swinton, Jamie Bell and Octavia Spencer

programme.title: Pyewacket (2017)
programme.desc: An angst-ridden teenage girl awakens something in the woods when she naively performs an occult ritual to kill her mother. Horror, starring Nicole Munoz, Laurie Holden and Chloe Rose

programme.title: Hell Is for Heroes (1962)
programme.desc: A rebellious soldier defies orders to lead two men on a secret attack on a German pillbox, but his mission fails and the other two soldiers are killed. Court-martialled for his actions, he remains convinced his plan was sound and ignores the sentence to make a second attempt at destroying the emplacement. Second World War adventure, with Steve McQueen, James Coburn and Bobby Darin

programme.title: Gunsmoke (1953)
programme.desc: A wicked landowner wants to get his hands on a farmer's ranch, so hires a gunslinger to kill him. However, the mercenary befriends his intended target - and also falls for his daughter - so resolves to defend them from their enemies during a cattle drive. Western, starring Audie Murphy, Paul Kelly, Susan Cabot and Donald Randolph

programme.title: Elephant Walk (1954)
programme.desc: A woman struggles to come to terms with her tea plantation owner husband's obsession with his dead father. Melodrama, starring Elizabeth Taylor, Peter Finch, Dana Andrews and Abraham Sofaer

programme.title: Alvarez Kelly (1966)
programme.desc: A cynical, mercenary cattle drover sets out to deliver a herd to soldiers at a Union base during the American Civil War. During the journey, he is kidnapped by a Confederate colonel, who hopes to persuade him to help steal the animals and take them deep into rebel territory. Western, starring William Holden, Richard Widmark and Janice Rule

programme.title: A Walk in the Woods (2015)
programme.desc: A travel writer decides to hike the Appalachian Trail, a 2,200-mile journey through some of America's most rugged terrain. However, the only companion he can find for his exhibition is a roguish old friend, who sees it as an opportunity to get out of paying his debts. Fact-based drama adapted from Bill Bryson's travel book, starring Robert Redford, Nick Nolte and Emma Thompson

programme.title: The Martian (2015)
programme.desc: A manned mission to Mars is abruptly abandoned, with one crew member left for dead. However, the astronaut has survived and faces a series of challenges - to contact Earth and arrange his rescue and to survive for the years it will take for a spacecraft to reach him on resources intended to last the crew a month. Ridley Scott's sci-fi drama based on the novel by Andy Weir, starring Matt Damon, Jessica Chastain, Kristen Wiig and Chiwetel Ejiofor

programme.title: Escape from New York (1981)
programme.desc: Former special forces soldier Snake Plissken is sentenced to life on Manhattan Island, an anarchic penal colony for the most dangerous criminals. When Air Force One is hijacked and crashes there, Snake is coerced into rescuing the US president from prisoners holding him hostage. John Carpenter's sci-fi action adventure, with Kurt Russell, Donald Pleasence, Lee Van Cleef, Adrienne Barbeau and Isaac Hayes

programme.title: An Unsuitable Job for a Woman (1981)
